string.text: Recapture Territory for Kuznetsov
You have been ordered to recapture lost territory.

%c[ui_8]We have lost one of our patrols. I need you to head to %c[ui_orange]Cordon%c[ui_8] near the old train bridge and find out what happened. Are you ready for this?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
The job is done? Great!
Protect Military Territory for Kuznetsov
You have been assigned to lead an assault to clear out any unauthorized individuals.

%c[ui_8]There was a report about a huge number of hostile forces at the %c[ui_orange]Agroprom factory%c[ui_8]. I need volunteers to clear the area from unauthorized personnel. Are you ready?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Great job. Keep it up you'll be in line for a commendation.
Assault Territory for Kuznetsov
You have been ordered to capture territory and eliminate enemy forces.

%c[ui_8]Our patrol reported enemy forces approaching one of our camps. I am looking for volunteers that are willing to head to the %c[ui_orange]Swamps%c[ui_8] and destroy the enemy forces. We can not allow our camp there to be in danger.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
The task is done? Good job.
Eliminate mercenary squad for Kuznetsov
You have been ordered to eliminate a group of mercenaries.

%c[ui_8]The activities of a professional armed force, one with which we have no connection, have become more frequent in the Zone. Our task is to stop their activities. Intelligence reported the location of one of the mercenary camps. Your task is to destroy their squad at the %c[ui_orange]Wild Territory%c[ui_8]. Are you ready for the mission?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
The task is completed? Great!
Take the PDA from the stash and deliver it to Kuznetsov
Go to the specified location, take the PDA with intelligence data from the stash, and bring it to Kuznetsov.

%c[ui_8]One of our teams was returning with intelligence important to the command and ran into an ambush. Before we lost contact with them, the guys provided the coordinates of where they hid the PDA with the information. I need a volunteer to go to the location and retrieve the device.
Mission accomplished? Well done!
Capture Enemy Target for Spooner
You have been assigned a hostile target to capture or kill.
%c[ui_8]HQ has a list of the most wanted individuals in the Zone. If you can get to any of them, there will be a bonus in your next paycheck. Are you up for the job?
Outstanding work! The commander will be pleased.
Eliminate Mutants for Spooner
Mutants have been spotted nearby. The task is to eliminate the mutant threat and report back after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]There are too many mutants around. They howl all night and the commander is furious! I am looking for a volunteer to take care of them. Do you have the courage to do it?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Great work! The commander will be pleased.
Take revenge on the enemy!
%s from enemy dead bodies for Spooner.
Take a revenge on the enemy faction and bring the patches from the dead bodies.
%c[ui_8]One of our outposts was attacked by the enemy. They wounded and killed many of our men. We need a raid into enemy territory. Bring a dozen %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] as proof of success.
The task is done? Excellent work!
Find %s for Kirilov
%s are required by Kirilov to install basic equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Hey, can I ask you a favour? If you are interested in helping me out, I will tell you what I need.
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Great! You brought exactly what I've asked. Thanks.
Find %s for Kirilov
%s are required by Kirilov to install advanced equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Alright, If you are up for it, I need more tools. But they may be a bit harder to find. Can you do this for me?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Great! Come back any time if you need me to take a look at your gear.
Find %s for Kirilov
%s are required by Kirilov to install expert equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Alright, If you are up for it, I need more tools. But they may be a bit harder to find. Can you do this for me?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Great! Come back any time if you need me to take a look at your gear.
Find %s for Kirilov
Kirilov asked for a %s. It needs to be in good condition.
I need a certain gun. If you are interested in the job, I will give you more details. What would you say?

%c[ui_8]I need a certain gun to use it for my work. At the moment I am looking for a good condition %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. I am sure, you will be able to find one. To improve the gun's condition, use a %c[ui_orange]Gunsmith kit%c[ui_8] or bring it to me for fixing, but it won't be free.
Great! Exactly what I need.
Bring Alcohol for Lieutenant Rogovets
Get %s and bring it to Lieutenant Rogovets, so he can use it for wound disinfection.
I need more alcohol for wound disinfection. I will pay you if you bring me some.

%c[ui_8]The CO confiscated most of my alcohol stash for his so-called 'preventive needs'. What's left might not even cover treating the boys' wounds or for sterilizing tools. I'll pay if you bring something to replace it. %c[ui_orange]%s%c[default] would be perfect.
Perfect, exactly what I needed. Thank you!
